subject: FW: for Jeffrey
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: BEHNBOM@aol.com [mailto:BEHNBOM@aol.com] 
Sent: Friday, February 29, 2008 12:10 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: for Jeffrey


Dear Jeffrey,
 
as you know, Freja will be working with me for the next six months, here
and in Stockholm. I think she is just super; she will be working out of
our BBB offices at Stockholm School of Economics with Cecilia and Helena
there. Your continous support is what basically keeps the whole thing
going and we are forever thankful for all you do!! If it is possible, it
would be terrific is she could bring another check when she goes over
there next week.
 
Love,
 
BE
 
 



________________________________

Dear Jeffrey,
 
as you know, Freja will be working with me for the next six months, here and in Stockholm. I think she is just super; she will be working out of our BBB offices at Stockholm School of Economics with Cecilia and Helena there. Your continous support is what basically keeps the whole thing going and we are forever thankful for all you do!! If it is possible, it would be terrific is she could bring another check when she goes over there next week.
